message:
mcp-rvdna: --demo-collection flag — public rvdna-mcp answers real queries

Mirror of the --demo-backend pattern from rulake-mcp (commit 6c31eb2).
After the worker-pool fix on rulake-mcp, rvdna-mcp was the last
service still refusing every call (RVDNA_UNKNOWN_COLLECTION). All 5
rvdna_* tools were reachable but returned the same UNKNOWN code.

Fix: add --demo-collection CLI flag. When set, registers a
deterministic RvdnaT0Backend("demo") with one seeded collection
("demo", 64 k-mer vectors at D=8, PCG32 seed 0xDEADBEEF) before
serve_*. Witness reproducible across restarts and operators.

Result: rvdna_find / call_variants / translate / score / lineage
(once internal cap granted) all return witnessed results against
demo/demo. The v0.0.1 stub semantics still apply (data-plane
returns empty arrays — RaBitQ inner loop, variant index, codon
table land in v0.1) but the witness chain is live and verified
end-to-end.

Off in production deploys (witness over a 64-row toy collection
isn't useful). To activate on the live rvdna-mcp.ruv.io demo, the
Cloud Run --args needs to include |--demo-collection.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
